---
title: "Portfolio"
output: html_document 
contents: assignments
sort: "date asc"
---


Hello world

## Course Lessons

- Introduction to Literate Analysis Using Quarto 
- Tidy Data
- Cleaning and Wrangling data
- Data Visualization

Assignments
[a01](/assignments/a01_quarto_literate_analysis.html)
[intro to spatial data](/assignments/intro-to-spatial-data.html)
